# Task 002 - Initial CSS build-out

## Status
In-Progress

## Description
The site is a singlel page app that must be responsive to viewport dimensions. There are three main components of the page: 1. the hero section, 2. the footer section, 3. a repeatable body section. The overall page layout will involve flexbox and media queries.

Hero:
The hero section will contain a background image or video. if video, it autoplays without sound, loops, and lacks any play controls. Within the hero section, a responsive text element. on pageload, the individual characters in this text will appear by fading in as they animate vertically from beneath the baseline to their natural position.

Footer:
The footer section contains a signup form for my email list. The background of the section should decorative using a programmatically generated method like perlin noise. Using perslin noise has the feature we want which is being unique to each rendering.

Stackable Body Section:
For this portfolio site, there will be several instances of these modular sections. Each stackable body section has a border radius of 20px, background-color black and text color white. at the top of the section is a horizontal arrangement of text.that text will include a left-justified title and a right justified sub-header.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] valid HTML5 markup
- [x] all static assets should be loaded locally. no CDN-loaded assets
- [x] all CSS rulesets related to this task belong in a single file in the js/ folder
